abandonedReason: Template stub — spec/tasks were never filled by PM/planner. The intended scope (wrap Claude Code /plugin commands list/enable/disable/install/uninstall in Skill Studio UI) was either delivered piecemeal in adjacent increments (0670 skill-builder-universal, 0701 provider model picker, 0703 create-flow hotfix, 0707 detail-view redesign) or remains outside current SpecWeave scope. The 0700-tagged commits ('0700 polish: indent NamedScopeSection', 'vibrant --color-action', 'honest project-switch UX') were polish/UX commits attributed under this increment number but are not the original CLI-wrapper feature. Closing as abandoned to keep the increment ledger honest; if the CLI wrapper is still wanted it should be a fresh increment with proper scope.
